title: Team Fortress 2 poop: Meet the Spy Assassin
description:
The Spy goes medieval as Team Fortress 2 makes its way to the Crusades (OMG FACESTAB H4X!!!111!!!).

I'm pretty pleased with how this one turned out.  Team Fortress 2's wealth of voice files made it easy to find the perfect selections.  This vid was inspired by my two current video game obsessions right now.  Whether it's the butterfly knife or the wrist blade, backstabbing never gets old.  Enjoy!

BORING LEGAL STUFF SO HOPEFULLY EA WON'T USE THIS AS A FREE MARKETING OPPORTUNITY LIKE THEY DID WITH MY "MEET THE BARREL ROLL" VID:
Assassin's Creed and Team Fortress 2 are the properties of Ubisoft and Valve respectively along with any and all partnering companies (that means you, EA).  I didn't make the video, I just edited it.  All rights to the original content belongs to its creators, blah blah blah, etc.
